rationale: There is plausible conceptual overlap: the citing paper studies omnichannel cross-channel behavior and channel switching mechanisms, while the cited paper provides showrooming/channel-theory foundations. But the matched evidence is only a bare DOI entry (reference 32) with no in-text citation context, and the citing note does not explicitly identify this work as a core theory/method source. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop but not strong enough to clearly keep.
